title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama project: get up and running with Llama 2 and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, letting you chat with local models in a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers to interact with the Ollama API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama models as first-class LLMs and embedders.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama comparable to ChatGPT UI; manage models and conversations in the browser.

title: ollama4j – Java client for Ollama
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin SDK exposing Ollama endpoints with fluent builders and async calls.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Cross-platform TUI (terminal UI) for chatting with Ollama models from the command line.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-style code-completion engine for VS Code.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma to chat with local PDFs or text corpora.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaEmbedder nodes for pipelines.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n node that lets you call Ollama models inside no-code workflows.

title: ollama-curl
summary: Lightweight shell library exposing Ollama endpoints as POSIX-compliant curl functions.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that brings local LLM summarization and Q&A to your vault notes.

title: ollama-grpc
summary: gRPC service wrapper around Ollama REST API for strongly-typed micro-service deployments.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-qt
summary: Cross-platform desktop GUI for Ollama built with Qt6 and C++.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app + REST API that exposes Ollama endpoints with user management and rate limits.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat component template that wires a UI to Ollama in under 50 lines of code.
